news.t: Using ETFs to capture momentum during the market's wild swings

holdings.infoBox: ILOW is an equity ETF with a total of 99 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.28%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 2.41%, Prysmian at 2.07%, Schneider Electric S.E. at 2.07%, and Novartis AG at 2.00%.

overview.description: The AB International Low Volatility Equity ETF (ILOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in large- and mid-cap equity securities located outside of the US. Security selection and weighting focuses on company fundamentals and quantitative research. ILOW was launched on Jul 29, 2015 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: Using ETFs to capture momentum during the market's wild swings
data.text: September's seasonal volatility could challenge the Big Tech trade, but one low-volatility ETF is still betting big on it.
